message:
feat(ops): add context budget and compaction observability (ft-3681t.9.4)

Tracks per-pane AI agent context-window pressure (Green/Yellow/Red/Black),
compaction events, and recovery guidance. Fleet-wide aggregation via
ContextBudgetRegistry with snapshot support for dashboards and alerting.

21 unit tests covering pressure tiers, tracker lifecycle, registry
aggregation, and serde roundtrips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
